case_title: PAK AUTO REPAIR, BODY SHOP & TOWING SERVICE RESPONDENT VS. LATOYA CALVIN APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT CALVIN, LATOYA AS TO RESPONDENT PAK AUTO REPAIR, BODY SHOP & TOWING SERVICE HEARING SET FOR JUN-09-2004 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL
ORDER AND STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM
MINUTES FOR JUN-09-2004 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUN-09-2004. THE TRIAL IS HEARD BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. BOTH SIDES OFFER TESTIMONY. JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF PAK AUTO AND AGAINST LATOYA CALVIN. CLERK:DANIAL LEMIRE.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT PAK AUTO REPAIR, BODY SHOP & TOWING SERVICE RECOVER FROM APPELLANT CALVIN, LATOYA $1,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,475.00, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
